summary: Tested Staff Portal iteration 65 features: call_status/last_call_at API fields, WhatsApp tab, mobile-friendly pipeline, NEW leads sorting. Fixed bug where call_status wasn't being persisted (duplicate endpoint in server.py). All 9 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend code review verified all features implemented correctly.

issues: Staff login now requires Email+OTP or Mobile OTP - automated UI testing blocked

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: call_status and last_call_at fields were not being persisted - duplicate endpoint in server.py (line 4279) was missing these fields. Added call tracking fields to server.py endpoint.
WhatsApp tab implemented in StaffPortal navigation (line 604) with Inbox icon and 'WA' short label for mobile
WhatsApp Inbox in staff mode filters conversations by staffLeadIds (lines 348-350 in WhatsAppInbox.js)
Mobile-friendly pipeline section uses overflow-x-auto and min-w-max for horizontal scrolling (lines 715-716)
NEW leads sorting implemented: isNew leads appear first, then sorted by assigned_at descending (lines 907-916)
Filter counts (All/Uncalled/Called) correctly use both local calledLeads state AND backend call_status field (lines 863, 869)
Call Now button updates both local state and backend call_status via PUT /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads/{lead_id} (lines 323-350)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - OTP auth blocks automated UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Portal login requires OTP authentication (Email+OTP or Mobile OTP). Backend API tests can be run without authentication. Key data-testids: 'nav-tab-whatsapp' (WhatsApp tab), 'call-btn-{lead_id}' (Call Now button), 'mobile-lead-status-{lead_id}' (status dropdown). The call_status field is now properly persisted via PUT /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads/{lead_id}.

backend_apis.PUT /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads/{lead_id: PASS - Now accepts call_status and last_call_at fields (BUG FIXED)
backend_apis.GET /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads: PASS - Returns leads with pagination and call_status field
backend_apis.GET /api/whatsapp/conversations: PASS - Returns conversations with lead info for staff filtering

frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - WhatsApp Tab: VERIFIED - Line 604: Navigation tab with id='whatsapp', label='WhatsApp', shortLabel='WA'
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - WhatsApp Inbox Integrat: VERIFIED - Lines 1219-1223: WhatsAppInbox with staffMode=true, staffId, staffLeadIds props
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Mobile Pipeline: VERIFIED - Lines 715-716: overflow-x-auto and min-w-max for horizontal scrolling
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - NEW Leads Sorting: VERIFIED - Lines 907-916: Sort by isNew flag first, then assigned_at descending
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Filter Counts: VERIFIED - Lines 863, 869: Counts use both calledLeads state and call_status field
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - Call Now Handler: VERIFIED - Lines 323-350: Updates local state, localStorage, and backend call_status
frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Staff Mode Filter: VERIFIED - Lines 348-350: Filters conversations by staffLeadIds

bug_fixed.issue: call_status and last_call_at fields not being persisted when staff calls a lead
bug_fixed.root_cause: Duplicate PUT endpoint in server.py (line 4279) was being used instead of routes/staff.py. The server.py endpoint was missing call_status and last_call_at field handling.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added call tracking fields to server.py endpoint at lines 4310-4313
bug_fixed.verification: Backend test test_staff_update_lead_with_call_status now passes - call_status='called' is properly saved and returned

rca_of_issue: The PUT /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads/{lead_id} endpoint was defined in both server.py and routes/staff.py. FastAPI was routing requests to the server.py version which lacked the call_status and last_call_at field handling. Fixed by adding these fields to the server.py endpoint.
